name: Applesauce Cake 1
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl, mix together the butter and brown sugar until well combined.
2. Add the salt, cinnamon, baking soda, and nutmeg to the mixture. Stir until all ingredients are evenly distributed.
3. Gradually add the flour and applesauce to the bowl, mixing until just combined.
4. Fold in the raisins.
5. Grease an oblong baking pan.
6. Pour the batter into the prepared pan.
7. Bake at 350°F (175°C) for about 35 minutes, or until a toothpick inserted into the center of the cake comes out clean.
8. Allow the cake to cool in the pan for a few minutes before removing it and serving.
